---
title: ""
format:
  html:
    toc: false
    body-classes: "page-contacts"
---

## Contacts

-   **Email**: maria.spano\[at\]unina.it
-   **Affiliation**: Department of Economics and Statistics, University of Naples Federico II
-   **Address**: Via Cintia, Monte Sant'Angelo, Naples, Italy
-   **ORCID**: <a href="https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3103-2342" target="_blank">0000-0002-8517-9411</a>
-   **Google Scholar**: <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=kh_hGT0AAAAJ" target="_blank">Google Scholar Profile</a>
-   **Researcher ID**: <a href="https://www.researcherid.com/rid/F-3788-2018" target="_blank">F-3788-2018</a>
-   **Researchgate**: <a href="https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Maria-Spano-2" target="_blank">Maria_Spano</a>


### Research Institutions and Groups
-   <a href="https://www.dises.unina.it" target="_blank"> Dept. of Economics and Statistics</a>

-   <a href="https://www.unina.it" target="_blank"> University of Naples Federico II</a>

-   <a href="https://www.k-synth.com" target="_blank"> K-Synth Academic Spin-off</a>

-   <a href="https://www.bibliometrix.org" target="_blank"> Bibliometrix Website</a>

-   <a href="https://www.bibliometrix.org/sssm" target="_blank"> Summer School in Science Mapping</a>
